notes: Hand-authored roster for the Relationship Map view. Positions are pixel coordinates on a ~1400x960 virtual canvas laid out as four horizontal levels top-to-bottom: Institutions (row 1), Officials (row 2), Witnesses (row 3), Advocates (row 4). Within each row, nodes are ordered to minimise crossings with the vertical edges from/to adjacent rows. See NHI-ARCH-RELMAP-001 §7.

nodes.name: AARO
nodes.hoverSummary: Pentagon office established Dec 2021 to investigate anomalous phenomena across domains.

nodes.name: House Oversight
nodes.hoverSummary: Held the July 2023 and November 2024 open UAP hearings.

nodes.name: AATIP
nodes.hoverSummary: Classified Pentagon program (2007–2012), revealed by the NYT in December 2017.

nodes.name: UAPTF
nodes.hoverSummary: Navy-led successor to AATIP, 2020. Later folded into AARO.

nodes.name: Luis Elizondo
nodes.hoverSummary: Led AATIP before resigning in protest. Testified November 2024.

nodes.name: David Grusch
nodes.role: Fmr. NRO rep., UAP Task Force
nodes.hoverSummary: Sworn testimony, July 2023. Alleges government possession of non-human craft and biologics.

nodes.name: Chris Mellon
nodes.role: Fmr. Dep. Asst. Sec. of Defense
nodes.hoverSummary: Principal architect of current disclosure legislation.

nodes.name: Cmdr. David Fravor
nodes.hoverSummary: Commanded the Tic Tac encounter off USS Nimitz, November 2004.

nodes.name: Lt. Ryan Graves
nodes.hoverSummary: Documented regular UAP incursions on ATFLIR, 2014–15. Founded Americans for Safe Aerospace.

nodes.name: Ronald Moultrie
nodes.hoverSummary: Under Sec. of Defense for Intelligence & Security during the 2022 UAP hearings.

nodes.name: Sean Kirkpatrick
nodes.hoverSummary: Authored the 2024 AARO Historical Record Report. Publicly disputed Grusch's allegations.

nodes.name: Pete Hegseth
nodes.hoverSummary: Current SecDef under the 2026 disclosure directive.

nodes.name: Scott Bray
nodes.hoverSummary: Testified at the May 2022 House Intel Subcommittee hearing.

nodes.name: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna
nodes.hoverSummary: Drives the bipartisan House working group on UAP transparency.

nodes.name: Rep. Tim Burchett
nodes.hoverSummary: Led the charge for the 2023 open House Oversight hearings.

nodes.name: Sen. Harry Reid
nodes.hoverSummary: Secured the original AATIP appropriation in 2007. Pushed disclosure until his death.

nodes.name: Dr. Avi Loeb
nodes.hoverSummary: Leads the Galileo Project's scientific search for anomalous objects.
